testcase.name: @AfterClass tearDown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.remote.UnreachableBrowserException: Error communicating with the remote browser. It may have died. se:cdpVersion: 147.0.3912.72, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, testcase.name: verify_Acct_Resistration
